svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.3.0 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.2 Safari/537.36" version="29.3.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="em7xlQVSoRE9JZ3zXrx1"> <mxGraphModel dx="332" dy="196" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="cRM-XuDNLjebbLYLhaoi-21" connectable="0" parent="1" style="group" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="90" x="390" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cRM-XuDNLjebbLYLhaoi-18" parent="cRM-XuDNLjebbLYLhaoi-21" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#DEB887;strokeWidth=7;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cRM-XuDNLjebbLYLhaoi-19" parent="cRM-XuDNLjebbLYLhaoi-21" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36.25" width="30" x="40" y="11.879999999999995" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cRM-XuDNLjebbLYLhaoi-20" edge="1" parent="cRM-XuDNLjebbLYLhaoi-21" style="shape=flexArrow;endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fillColor=#DEB887;strokeColor=none;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="20" y="29.879999999999995" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="90" y="29.879999999999995" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
